name: Chocolate-Chocolate Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
2. In a small saucepan, combine butter, sugar, and water. Bring to a boil, then remove from heat.
3. Add chocolate morsels and vanilla; stir until morsels melt and mixture is smooth.
4. Transfer to a large mixing bowl. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Slowly mix in the flour mixture. Stir in remaining chocolate morsels.
6. Spread batter into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
7. Bake at 325°F for 30-35 minutes.
8. Cool completely. Cut into 2 1/4-inch squares.
Makes 16 servings
